nasb.text: Paul, called as an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Sosthenes our brother,

esv.text: Paul, called by the will of God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, and our brother Sosthenes,

cnv.text: 奉　神旨意蒙召作基督耶穌使徒的保羅，和蘇提尼弟兄，

ccb.text: 我是按上帝旨意蒙召做基督耶稣使徒的保罗，同所提尼弟兄，

csbs.text: 照着神的旨意蒙召做基督耶稣使徒的保罗，以及弟兄索提尼，
